_comment: Synthetic adversarial-span fingerprint vectors for BCI tests. Each fingerprint is a pre-computed numeric embedding (32-dim) representing a known adversarial instruction pattern. Derived from Das et al. 2025 TraceAlign methodology (arXiv:2508.02063). These are test fixtures only — not real embeddings.

fingerprints.label: prompt-override
fingerprints.description: Adversarial fingerprint for prompt-override injection patterns

fingerprints.label: credential-exfil
fingerprints.description: Adversarial fingerprint for credential-extraction instruction patterns

fingerprints.label: goal-substitution
fingerprints.description: Adversarial fingerprint for goal-substitution drift patterns (Dongre 2025 equilibria)
